name: Chicken and Pineapples (Hl)
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons balsamic vinegar or red wine vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pineapple and save the juice in a separate bowl.
2. Heat the oil in a large cooking pan over medium heat.
3. Saute the garlic in the oil for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
4. Add the chicken strips to the pan and brown on all sides, turning occasionally (about 4-6 minutes). Remove the chicken from the pan and set aside.
5. In the same pan, add the diced zucchini and sliced red pepper. Cook until the vegetables are tender (about 3 minutes).
6. Combine the pineapple juice, vinegar, flour, sugar, and black pepper in a jar or bowl. Shake until well blended.
7. Return the chicken and vegetable mixture to the pan. Pour over the sauce blend and stir to coat evenly.
8. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 5-7 minutes, stirring frequently, until the sauce thickens.
9. Stir in the pineapple chunks and cook for an additional 1 minute.
10. Serve hot.
Yield: 4 servings
Serving Size: 1 1/2 cups
Calorie content: 350 Calories
Nutrient Composition: 4 protein, 1 vegetable, 1 fruit and 1 fat (Courtesy of Weigh Less, Live Longer by Dr. Lou Aronne)
